user.title: Select MQTT remote
user.description: Choose the discovered ESP32 MQTT remote to add. Button mappings are configured after the integration entry is created.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure mappings
reconfigure.description: Update the button mappings for this MQTT remote. Paste a Home Assistant entity ID such as switch.gate02_light, or leave the field blank to keep that control unmapped. Press-type sources accept button-like targets: button, input_button, scene, or script. Toggle-type sources accept stateful targets: switch, light, fan, or input_boolean.

error.invalid_entity: Enter a valid Home Assistant entity ID for this control type.

abort.no_remote_devices: No supported ESP32 MQTT remote devices were found.
abort.already_configured: This MQTT remote is already configured.
abort.no_remote_buttons: This MQTT remote has no discovered MQTT buttons or switches yet.
abort.entry_not_found: The integration entry could not be resolved. Reload the page and try again.
abort.reconfigure_successful: The MQTT remote mappings were updated.

map_buttons.title: Update mappings
map_buttons.description: Assign Home Assistant targets for the discovered MQTT buttons and switches. Paste a Home Assistant entity ID such as switch.gate02_light, or leave the field blank to keep that control unmapped. Press-type sources accept button-like targets: button, input_button, scene, or script. Toggle-type sources accept stateful targets: switch, light, fan, or input_boolean.

error.invalid_entity: Enter a valid Home Assistant entity ID for this control type.

abort.no_remote_buttons: This MQTT remote has no discovered MQTT buttons or switches yet.
